_comment_1: Phase-8 Session 4 (G2): regime → allowed strategy list. Calibrated 2026-04-22 (Audit-O) by signal-family affinity: momentum/trend families ship in trending regimes; mean-reversion in ranging; volatility in volatile; adverse silences everything. Strategy identifiers match chad.types.StrategyName values.
_comment_2: Unknown regime keys fall through to the 'unknown' bucket. An empty list for a regime silences ALL strategies under that regime.
_comment_3: Consumed by chad.portfolio.regime_activation.filter_intents_by_regime(...) at the pre-routing intercept point.
